Blacksmithing

Achievements

  • Todo: Create a forged snake
  • Todo: Create a forged Japanese arrow tip
  • Create TikToks for the forge to promote the business
  • Experiment with shapes and techniques on a metal rod
  • Created a chef's knife inspired by Japanese bunko knives
  • Take an introductory class with Sandra and Aimie in highschool while creating a glass installation for the new RIM Park community center in 2013. Led by glass artist Laurie Spieker, project Glass Fourteen.

Alena Delena © 2026
